signal-red.$description: Signal Red — Primary CTA fill, nav active state, brand logo, emphasis body text, accent box-shadows on interactive elements — the single chromatic voice of the system, reserved for moments of decision and identity

carbon-ink.$description: Carbon Ink — Primary text, heading text on light surfaces, icon strokes, nav text, button text, all structural borders and dividers

summit-white.$description: Summit White — Primary page canvas, card surface, button text on red, input fill, nav background, hero foreground text on dark imagery

ridge-gray.$description: Ridge Gray — Input border, subtle form dividers — the only non-black neutral, used where a softer boundary is needed without losing contrast

agrandir.$description: Display and heading voice — the 90px weight 600 at line-height 1.0 acts as architectural type, not running text; 26px at weight 350/600 bridges display and body; the ultra-tight 1.0 leading on the largest size is a deliberate poster-typography choice that lets letters stack as visual mass

dm-sans.$description: Workhorse body and UI font — paragraphs, nav items, button labels, form text, footer copy; 16px at 1.4 for body, 14px at 1.3 for nav/labels, 12px for tertiary meta

dm-mono.$description: Micro-label and wayfinding voice — uppercase category tags like 'ENTREPRISES', 'COACHS & EXPERTS', program identifiers; 0.04em letter-spacing widens the monospace rhythm so these labels read as expedition wayfinding rather than code

summit-white.$description: Surface level 0: Primary page canvas — most content sections sit on this

glacier-mist.$description: Surface level 1: Section background for supporting content blocks (social proof, stats)

trail-cream.$description: Surface level 2: Warm feature card surface for content blocks that need separation without harshness

base-camp-dark.$description: Surface level 3: Hero photographic layer — deep blue-black mountain landscape at dusk; serves as full-bleed narrative canvas
